message:
feat: add FrankenConnection::open_schema_only for read-only inspection paths

Adds open_schema_only() to FrankenConnection, which delegates to
fsqlite::Connection::open_schema_only(). This is appropriate for
read-only inspection paths (e.g. doctor probes, schema introspection)
that must avoid introducing writer semantics such as close-time WAL
checkpoints — opening in normal mode can inadvertently checkpoint a
WAL that another writer is actively using.

- Add open_schema_only() pub method with doc comment explaining the
  read-only / no-checkpoint semantics
- Add schema_only_file_connection_reads_existing_rows test: creates a
  DB with a table and rows via normal open, then reopens via
  open_schema_only and verifies it can read the previously inserted
  data through PRAGMA busy_timeout and query_sync

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
